slots.description: slot for button text content or icon, icon placement determined by whether <mlv-icon> is inserted before or after text content.
This is a default/unnamed slot for card content
This is a default/unnamed slot for card content content
This is a default/unnamed slot for card footer content
default slot for the dialog footer
default slot for the dialog header

members.name: position
members.description:
Sets the side position of the popover relative to the provided anchor element.
For dialog the anchor defaults to the document body.

members.name: alignment
members.description:
Sets the alignment of the popover relative to the provided anchor element.
If an arrow exists the alginment will be relative to the arrow against the anchor.

members.name: size
members.description: Sets the maximum size of the dialog.

members.name: closable
members.description:
Determines if a close button should render within dialog. Non-closable
dialogs can be used for dialogs that require user confirmation steps.

members.name: modal
members.description: Determines if a dialog should have a modal backdrop that visually overlays the UI.

members.name: anchor
members.description:
The anchor provides the element that the popover should position relative to.
Anchor can accept a idref string within the same render root or a HTMLElement DOM reference.

members.name: trigger
members.description:
The trigger defines what element triggers an `open` interaction event.
A trigger can accept a idref string within the same render root or a HTMLElement DOM reference.

members.name: hidden
members.description: Determines if popover should be rendered and positioned.

members.name: anchor
members.description:
The anchor provides the element that the popover should position relative to.
Anchor can accept a idref string within the same render root or a HTMLElement DOM reference.

members.name: trigger
members.description:
The trigger defines what element triggers an `open` interaction event.
A trigger can accept a idref string within the same render root or a HTMLElement DOM reference.

members.name: position
members.description: Sets the side position of the popover relative to the provided anchor element.

members.name: alignment
members.description: Sets the alignment of the popover relative to the provided anchor element.

members.name: closable
members.description: Determines if a close button should render within notification.

members.name: closeTimeout
members.description: A delayed `close` event will occur determined from the provided millisecond value.

members.name: hidden
members.description: Determines if popover should be rendered and positioned.

attributes.name: anchor
attributes.description:
The anchor provides the element that the popover should position relative to.
Anchor can accept a idref string within the same render root or a HTMLElement DOM reference.

attributes.name: trigger
attributes.description:
The trigger defines what element triggers an `open` interaction event.

attributes.name: position
attributes.description: Sets the side position of the popover relative to the provided anchor element.

attributes.name: alignment
attributes.description: Sets the alignment of the popover relative to the provided anchor element.

attributes.name: closable
attributes.description: Determines if a close button should render within notification.

attributes.name: close-timeout
attributes.description: A delayed `close` event will occur determined from the provided millisecond value.

attributes.name: hidden
attributes.description: Determines if popover should be rendered and positioned.

declarations.description: Utility for applying mixin recursively to all custom elements, used for scoped element registry polyfills and shims
declarations.name: scope
defineScopedElement
declarations.description: Utility for registering elements with a scope prefix for global scope when Custom Element Scoped Registries are not available

declarations.name: createFixture
declarations.description:
Creates a test fixture DOM element for testing.
Fixture is ready when all custom elements have been defined.

declarations.name: elementIsStable
declarations.description: Awaits until Lit element has rendered and has no pending updates
